transactionalGuarantees: Single Postgres transaction for write path operations within one request; cross-request atomicity is not guaranteed
indexConsistencyBehavior: accepted writes are eventually indexed; indexed consistency waits for lexical and vector index visibility
paginationBehavior: cursor pagination for all list/search operations; stable ordering by (score desc, id asc)
backupRestoreExpectations: WAL archiving plus nightly base backups; restore tested monthly with RPO 15m and RTO 2h
